[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: One person is sitting on a blue-and-yellow plaid couch in a room, with a phone and a pair of shoes visible nearby.

Main Subject:
A person with dark, styled hair sits on a couch, leaning back slightly with one arm raised to the back of their head. They wear a black T-shirt with a white graphic design on the front, olive-green pants, and white sneakers; a black strap or band-like item is visible across their pants area. A smartphone lies on the couch cushion near their legs, and a pair of eyeglasses with dark frames rests on the couch to the right of the phone.

Setting:
The scene is indoors, in what looks like a lounge or living area. The background includes brown wooden cabinets or panels, a small table to the left with a round top, and part of a wall with light-colored paint. A patterned area rug covers the floor, and the lighting appears to be bright indoor light. A floor standing object or stand with a white panel partially appears behind the couch near the center-left.

Visual Details:
The couch is upholstered in thick plaid fabric with blue, yellow, and white stripes. The person’s raised arm and head position create a relaxed seated posture. The olive-green pants are spread across the couch cushion area, and the white sneakers with green detailing are placed on the patterned rug. The composition is shot from a slightly elevated angle, showing the couch, the person’s legs, and items on the cushion in the foreground.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person reclining on a plaid couch while resting one hand behind their head. Nearby on the couch are a smartphone and eyeglasses, and white sneakers are visible on the floor rug.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text found]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to contain no legible UI labels, captions, or printed text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man with dark, styled hair is sitting on a couch with a blue, yellow, and white plaid pattern. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a white graphic print of abstract figures and olive green cargo pants. His left arm is resting on his knee, and his right arm is bent with his hand behind his head, as if he's casually adjusting his hair. He's wearing white sneakers with green accents. The couch has a textured, possibly woven, fabric.

The background suggests an indoor setting, possibly a cafe or lounge. To the left, there's a glimpse of a shelf unit with decorative items and plants, and a circular wooden table with metal legs. A tall, white lampshade with a dark base is visible behind the man. The wall behind the couch is paneled with a warm, brown wood tone, and above that, a textured off-white wall. The lighting is warm and ambient, creating a relaxed and somewhat intimate atmosphere. The overall mood is casual and contemplative. The image has a slightly desaturated, natural color palette, with the vibrant plaid of the couch providing a focal point. The composition is centered on the man, with a shallow depth of field blurring the background slightly.
